title: paspalum cultratum
intro: Paspalum cultratum, also known as the cut-grass paspalum, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family and is native to tropical regions of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Paspalum cultratum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and treat respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and poultices, to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
